chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3473 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. There is no intimation. This petition is pending since 2017 and it was only fixed on 09.11.2017 when notices were ordered to be issued to the respondents and learned A.A.G. Sindh. Thereafter no efforts have been made to fix the matter in Court. It reflects that petitioner is not interested to proceed with the matter further. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
